summary: P0 auto-logout bug fix verified. Cookie settings (secure=true, samesite=none, httponly=true) are correctly applied on /auth/login, /auth/register and /auth/refresh. Session persists across page reloads and token refresh works.
passed: POST /api/auth/login returns 200 with admin@kostcharge.com and sets access_token + refresh_token cookies (HttpOnly, Secure)
POST /api/auth/refresh returns 200 and rotates access_token cookie with Secure + SameSite=None
UI login flow: user redirected to /dashboard after login; dashboard renders KPIs and recent invoices
Session persistence: user stayed logged in on /dashboard after 3 consecutive page reloads (login form did not reappear)
Browser fetch to /api/auth/me returns 200 with credentials:'include' (cross-origin cookies working)
Browser fetch to /api/auth/refresh returns 200; reload after refresh keeps user logged in
Cookie flags verified via curl: HttpOnly + Secure + max-age 900 (access) / 604800 (refresh)
notes: Non-blocking: WebSocket to /socket.io/ fails (feature not implemented) - harmless dev-tool noise. Two 401s on initial load are the expected /auth/me probe before login (normal behavior). 2-min token-refresh wait was not executed literally; refresh endpoint was invoked explicitly and verified working.
